title: Codex visual review S04 panel a1

payload.notes: Codex VISUAL second-model review completed (GPT-5.5 xhigh) independent read of S04_panel_a01.png, mode=baked, CLI -i path, RC=0。CANONICAL DUO 双人身份锁稳定：executor 蓝衣棕发无须于卡扇中心高跳撒卡（高度明显低于其 S02 hand-off MAX 跳，能量阶梯保持），reviewer 绿衣黑发有须立于台边理卡、眉头微锁，与 duo_canonical_ref/identity_refs 一致，identity_consistency=5。像素风格整体统一：#0A0E27 暗空洞密度对齐 cal_S12 基准，霓虹网格地面、拖光浮卡、悬浮书架与单盏暖台灯破冷协调，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线从 executor 撒卡导向中央 20 IDEAS 卡扇（'#01 schema-first' 唯一可读卡 + 琥珀 DDL T-19:42 chip）再到 reviewer 与右侧 audit 代码列/PLAN→CHECK 流程图，composition_readability=5。本稿为 baked-duo：baked CJK 气泡（shout '二十个方向，随便挑！' / terse '先过查新，再说挑。'）与英文技术字面清晰锐利、拼写正确，baked_text_quality=5；观察到的字面文本 observed_literals=["二十个方向，随便挑！", "先过查新，再说挑。", "20 IDEAS", "#01", "schema-first", "DDL", "T-19:42", "LLM DECODING", "IDEA SPACE", "def audit(plan):", "invariants = []", "for step in plan:", "check(step)", "return report(invariants)", "# VERIFY BEFORE WE SHIP", "PLAN", "CHECK", "OK", "REJECT"]，语义与 B03 void-side idea-fan 语境一致，content_corruption_present=false。面板内除 baked 文本外无零星模拟字形残留 stray_text_present=false；安全区被 baked 气泡与卡扇占据 safezone_present=false（baked 模式预期内）。霓虹网格与卡扇拖光边缘未见粒子伪影或肢体融合，artifact_severity=0（无 beat 级缺陷）。与 Gemini 在 identity 上零分歧（disagreeId=0）。整体 KEEP 倾向：双人身份/语义/烤字/构图全稳，无内容变形。
